restaurants.location: 899 Sukhumvit Soi 49, Khlong Toei Nuea, Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Plant-based and healthy menu; spacious; private dining room available for groups; good for mixed dietary requirements

restaurants.location: 39 Sukhumvit Soi 16, Khlong Toei, Bangkok
restaurants.distanceTravelNote: 1.2km from BTS Thonglor; taxi or Grab recommended
restaurants.notes: Bangkok institution for brunch; popular for weekend groups; limited large-table availability; arrive early

restaurants.location: Thonglor Soi 9, Sukhumvit 55, Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Craft burgers; small venue (~40 seats); can be cramped for large groups; best for 8 or fewer; no group menu

restaurants.location: Sukhumvit Soi 45, Khlong Toei Nuea, Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Modern Mediterranean; chef-curated set menus for groups; BYOB wine policy; good for business dinners

restaurants.location: 24 Sukhumvit Soi 53, Khlong Toei Nuea, Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Michelin-starred traditional Thai; tasting menu format; advance booking mandatory for groups; extraordinary food quality but high cost

restaurants.location: DONKI Mall Thonglor, Sukhumvit Soi 63, Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Japanese sushi bar inside DONKI Mall; easy accessibility; group-friendly; lunch and dinner sets; sake selection available

restaurants.location: Sukhumvit Soi 61, Khlong Toei Nuea, Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Family-run Italian with Italian-born chef; wood-fired pizza; group set menu available; BYOB wine; homely atmosphere

restaurants.location: Villa Market, Sukhumvit Soi 49, Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Modern Mediterranean with Thai influences; chef's table available; curated wine list; private events on request

restaurants.location: Gaysorn, 999 Phloen Chit Road, Pathum Wan, Bangkok
restaurants.distanceTravelNote: 4km from BTS Thonglor; BTS Chidlom (different area)
restaurants.notes: Dessert cafe with savoury options; not strictly Thonglor area; budget-friendly; limited group seating

restaurants.location: Sukhumvit Soi 63 (Ekkamai), Bangkok
restaurants.notes: Outdoor street food cluster; authentic Thai; very budget-friendly; casual atmosphere; no reservations; good for groups comfortable with outdoor setting

restaurants.location: 3rd Floor, Gaysorn Village, 999 Phloen Chit Road, Bangkok
restaurants.distanceTravelNote: 3.5km from BTS Thonglor; BTS Chidlom nearby
restaurants.notes: Michelin-starred Thai; ancient recipes modernised; advance booking required; slightly outside Thonglor but adjacent Bangkok fine dining scene
